data.title: Circle Unveils Cross-Blockchain Crypto Transfer Design Using USDC
data.description: Circle has announced a new technology design aimed at facilitating cryptocurrency transfers or swaps across different blockchains using USDC, without the need for holding native gas tokens. According to NS3.AI, the design could be implemented through Arc, a Gas Station model where developers cover the fees, or a Paymaster system that allows users to pay gas fees with USDC on existing blockchains.

data.title: Chainalysis to Implement Real-Time Monitoring for Sui Network
data.description: Chainalysis has announced its plan to support the Sui network and its native token, SUI, with a real-time monitoring system. According to NS3.AI, the company's Know Your Transaction solution will enable users to track network activity, receive instant alerts for any suspicious behavior, identify high-risk addresses, and oversee illicit activities.

data.title: China's Industrial Profits Surge Before Middle East Conflict Impacts Oil Market
data.description: China's industrial enterprises experienced a significant increase in profits during the first two months of 2026. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this growth occurred prior to the escalation of conflict in the Middle East, which has since disrupted the global oil market and driven up raw material costs. The surge in profits reflects a period of economic strength for China's industrial sector, although the subsequent geopolitical tensions have introduced new challenges for businesses reliant on stable oil prices and affordable raw materials.

data.title: Ping An of China to Increase Short-Term Debt Purchases Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
Ping An of China is set to increase its acquisitions of short-term debt issued by Chinese banks as a strategy to protect its investments from market fluctuations caused by the ongoing conflict in Iran. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's move to mitigate risks associated with the geopolitical tensions affecting global markets.

The decision comes as financial institutions worldwide are reassessing their portfolios in response to the instability in the Middle East. By focusing on short-term debt, Ping An aims to maintain liquidity and reduce exposure to long-term uncertainties.

This approach reflects a broader trend among investors seeking safer assets amid unpredictable market conditions. The situation in Iran has led to increased volatility, prompting companies like Ping An to adapt their investment strategies accordingly.

Ping An's strategy underscores the importance of flexibility in financial planning, especially during periods of geopolitical unrest. As the situation in Iran continues to evolve, investors are closely monitoring developments to adjust their strategies and safeguard their assets.

data.title: U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren Raises Concerns Over Beast Industries' Acquisition of Step
data.description:
U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren has expressed concerns regarding Beast Industries' acquisition of fintech company Step. According to BlockBeats, Step previously allowed minors to invest in cryptocurrencies.

In a letter sent on Monday, Warren requested additional information from Jimmy Donaldson, known as MrBeast, who has over 470 million YouTube subscribers, and Jeff Housenbold, CEO of Beast Industries.

Warren emphasized in her letter that Beast Industries, primarily an entertainment and consumer goods company, must exercise caution and comply with legal standards when venturing into financial services, especially those targeting children.

Beast Industries acquired Step in February. The company aims to make financial literacy and money management more accessible to young users. Step allows users under 18 to open bank accounts under parental supervision. Although Step is not a bank, it promotes its app as a way for teenagers and young adults to begin managing finances, offering tools for deposits, spending tracking, and credit building.

data.title: Gold Purchase Surges as Prices Dip Below $4,400
data.description: A significant transaction occurred as one address acquired 2,000 XAUt tokens at approximately $4,390 each, totaling around $8.78 million. According to NS3.AI, this purchase followed a decline in gold prices below the $4,400 mark, indicating investor interest in capitalizing on the lower price point.

data.title: AI Healthcare Stocks Surge in Hong Kong Market
data.description: AI healthcare concept stocks in the Hong Kong market experienced a notable rise. According to Jin10, Medlive Technology (02192.HK) saw an increase of over 9%, while Easy Health (02661.HK) and Bio-Thera Solutions-B (02315.HK) both rose by more than 6.5%. Additionally, Ark Health (06086.HK) climbed over 5%, and MicroPort Robotics (02252.HK) increased by more than 4%.

data.title: Pop Mart Executes Largest Buyback Amid Stock Decline Concerns
data.description: Pop Mart has initiated its most significant share buyback to date, aiming to restore investor confidence following a substantial drop in its stock value. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the decline was driven by worries over the company's heavy dependence on Labubu dolls for its growth strategy. The buyback is seen as a strategic move to reassure stakeholders and stabilize the company's market position.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 69,000 USDT with a Narrowed 3.12% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 27, 2026, 01:56 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 69,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 69,021.9375 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.12% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitget Wallet Skill launches Agentic Wallet, supporting social login.
data.description: Bitget Wallet Skill introduces Agentic Wallet, allowing users to log in or create wallets using their social media accounts. Agents can remotely sign transactions and check balances via TEE (Trusted Execution Environment), and it supports swap, cross-chain, and gas-free payments. Agentic Wallet capabilities are implemented based on Bitget Wallet Skill's social login wallet, using a TEE to host private keys. Neither the platform, users, nor agents can directly access the private keys; all signing operations require user confirmation before execution. Users can log in to the Bitget Wallet app using Google, Apple, or email, enable Bitget Wallet Skill in wallet management, obtain credentials, and complete configuration to use the service. Once enabled, Agentic Wallet is linked to the social login wallet within the app, and asset balances are interconnected. Currently, this feature supports networks such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, BNB Chain, Base, Arbitrum, Solana, Tron, and Morph, and has been verified in multiple scenarios including same-chain/cross-chain swaps and gas-free transactions on the BNB Chain, Solana, and Tron mainnets. This feature has been verified to be compatible with Agent platforms such as OpenClaw, Manus, Cursor, and Claude Code.

data.title: U.S. Senator Warren demands MrBeast disclose information related to its teen-based encryption business.
data.description: U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren has sent a letter to MrBeast (Jimmy Donaldson) and his company Beast Industries CEO Jeff Housenbold, requesting disclosure of information regarding their involvement in youth finance and cryptocurrency businesses. This move stems from Beast Industries' acquisition of fintech company Step in February of this year, which had allowed minors to access cryptocurrency investment features under parental supervision. In her letter, Warren emphasized that any financial services offered to minors must strictly adhere to relevant laws and regulations. (The Block)

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Expresses Concerns Over AI-Induced Power Centralization
data.description:
PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). In a public debate with e/acc representative Beff Jezos, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin expressed his concerns about the risks posed by artificial intelligence (AI). He highlighted two primary risks associated with AI. The first is the risk of proliferation, where the technology's immense power could lead to catastrophic consequences if it falls into the wrong hands. However, it is the second risk that truly keeps him awake at night: the potential for AI to enable unprecedented, permanent, and inescapable authoritarian control.

Buterin elaborated that while historical authoritarian regimes, no matter how powerful, had vulnerabilities and escape routes, the integration of AI with modern technology could eliminate these gaps. With AI, surveillance could become all-encompassing, predictions could preempt actions, and dissent could be quashed before it even forms. This scenario, according to Buterin, represents a significant threat to freedom and autonomy.

He concluded by suggesting that even slowing down AI development by four years would be worthwhile to mitigate these risks.

data.title: Japan's Financial Services Agency has warned companies such as KuCoin that they are offering derivatives trading without registration.
data.description: Japan's Financial Services Agency (FSA) has issued warning letters to KuCoin, NeonFX, theoption, and GTCFX, stating that they are providing over-the-counter (OTC) derivatives trading services to Japanese residents via the internet without registration. The FSA stated that these companies received the relevant notification in March, with KuCoin listed as a platform offering services to Japanese users. Previously, Japanese regulators issued similar warnings to exchanges such as KuCoin and Bybit in November 2024, and in February 2025, requested Apple and Google to suspend downloads of the KuCoin app. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Polymarket's probability that "gold will fall below $4,300 by the end of March" has risen to 39%, up 21% in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, as gold prices fall, the probability of gold falling below $4,300 by the end of March on Polymarket has risen to 39%, a 21% increase in 24 hours; the probability of gold falling below $4,000 by the end of March is currently 6%, a 2% increase in 24 hours. As of now, the trading volume of gold price prediction contracts for the end of March on Polymarket is approximately $2.825 million. Analysts believe that due to uncertainty surrounding the prospects of negotiations between the US and Iran, international crude oil futures prices have risen sharply, and the three major US stock indices in New York have fallen significantly. Affected by market concerns about inflation, international gold and silver prices have fallen sharply. According to Gate data, spot gold is currently trading at $4,402.51, a 0.55% decrease in 24 hours, and spot silver is currently trading at $68.154, a 0.08% decrease in 24 hours. Odaily Seer continuously focuses on the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Japan's 10-Year Government Bond Yield Continues to Rise
data.description: Japan's 10-year government bond yield has continued its upward trend, currently reported at 2.320%. According to Jin10, this increase reflects ongoing market dynamics and investor sentiment in the Japanese bond market. The rise in yields may indicate shifting expectations regarding inflation and monetary policy in Japan. Market participants are closely monitoring these developments as they assess the potential impact on the broader financial landscape.

data.title: Bittensor's TAO Staking Reaches 19% of Total Supply
data.description: Yuma announced that TAO staked on its subnets has reached 19% of Bittensor's total supply. According to NS3.AI, the staked value amounts to $691 million, achieving this milestone within 13 months.

data.title: Middle East Tensions Impact Helium Supply, Affecting Semiconductor Industry
data.description: Tensions in the Middle East continue to escalate, with reports indicating that Iran has attacked Qatar's natural gas export facilities, significantly reducing the supply of helium, a byproduct of natural gas. According to RTHK, helium is crucial for various industrial applications, particularly in the high-tech sector, including semiconductor manufacturing. Analysts suggest that if the conflict persists until May, shortages of essential raw materials like helium could disrupt semiconductor production, leading to broader challenges in technology-related downstream industries.

data.title: Circle Unfreezes Additional Hot Wallets Amid Ongoing Case
data.description:
Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT posted on X that Circle has recently unfrozen two more hot wallets associated with 500 Casino & Whale. This development occurred a few hours ago and has had significant downstream effects. Users have been unable to withdraw from a major centralized exchange to the previously frozen business hot wallet due to the Circle freeze, which was implemented in accordance with Know Your Transaction (KYT) protocols.

Despite these actions, there remains a lack of basic details regarding the case. Information about the plaintiff, expert witness, or any explanation from Circle on why the freeze was not contested has not been disclosed. The situation continues to unfold as stakeholders await further clarification from Circle.

data.title: Currency Exchange Rates: RMB Experiences Mixed Movements
data.description:
The latest currency exchange rates show varied movements for the Chinese yuan (RMB) against several major currencies. According to Jin10, the USD/RMB rate increased by 85 points to 6.9141, indicating a depreciation of the RMB. Meanwhile, the EUR/RMB rate decreased by 113 points to 7.9685. The HKD/RMB rate saw a slight increase of 0.4 points to 0.88361.

In contrast, the GBP/RMB rate fell by 155 points to 9.2130, and the AUD/RMB rate dropped significantly by 351 points to 4.7607. The CAD/RMB rate also decreased by 132 points to 4.9877, while the 100 JPY/RMB rate fell by 66 points to 4.3271.

The RMB appreciated against the Russian ruble, with the rate increasing by 487 points to 11.7774. The NZD/RMB rate decreased by 294 points to 3.9810, and the RMB/MYR rate rose by 44.8 points to 0.57859. Lastly, the CHF/RMB rate fell by 309 points to 8.6953, and the SGD/RMB rate decreased by 134 points to 5.3742.
